description: situation_room capability allow-list. Per ADR 0009: core:shell, core:fs, core:http, core:process are NOT enabled — the frontend cannot shell out, touch the filesystem, make HTTP calls, or spawn processes. All such operations go through Rust-side commands that route through situation_room_secure primitives. The custom #[tauri::command] handlers (classify, list_recent_plans, get_plan) are gated by the invoke_handler!() registration in src/main.rs; capabilities here gate built-in plugin permissions only.
